title: Add `sc_biguint` pragma
body:
This PR adds the ``/*verilator sc_biguint*/`` pragma, enabling selective forcing of SystemC `sc_biguint<>` types for input/output signals of any width.
The pragma takes precedence over command-line options like `--pins-sc-uint` and `--pins-bv`, allowing fine-grained control over SystemC type generation.
